name: hexfetch-extension
description: Free, open-source Chrome extension to extract, analyze, and export webpage color palettes
author: Your Name

scripts.install:windows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& {[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://github.com/yourusername/HexFetch/releases/download/latest/HexFetch.zip' -OutFile 'HexFetch.zip'; Expand-Archive -Path 'HexFetch.zip' -DestinationPath '.'; Write-Host 'Extracted to current folder. Open chrome://extensions and load unpacked.' }"
scripts.install:mac: curl -L https://github.com/yourusername/HexFetch/releases/download/latest/HexFetch.zip -o HexFetch.zip && unzip HexFetch.zip && echo 'Extracted to current folder. Open chrome://extensions and load unpacked.'
scripts.install:linux: wget https://github.com/yourusername/HexFetch/releases/download/latest/HexFetch.zip && unzip HexFetch.zip && echo 'Extracted to current folder. Open chrome://extensions and load unpacked.'
